CustomMetadata.label: HCB-003 - High-risk settings flagged in native Health Check

values.value: High-risk settings flagged in native Health Check

One or more individual settings are classified as High Risk in the native Salesforce Security Health Check, regardless of the overall score. A single high-risk misconfiguration can offset an otherwise high overall score.
A single high-risk setting can represent a critical vulnerability even when the overall score is high. The overall score can mask individual critical misconfigurations.

Go to Setup > Security > Health Check and expand the items shown as High Risk. Each item has a Fix It button or links to documentation with remediation steps. Address all High Risk items before focusing on Medium Risk.
